name: Land Title Guarantee Company
description_short: Colorado-based title and closing services company serving real estate, lending, and commercial professionals since 1967 with 45+ offices statewide.
description_long:
Land Title Guarantee Company was established in 1967 and has grown into Colorado's largest title and closing services provider, operating 45+ offices across the state with over 600 employees. As a family-owned business, the company has maintained deep roots in Colorado while expanding its service offerings across residential, commercial, and construction lending markets.

The company provides comprehensive title insurance, closing and escrow services, construction loan disbursement, and property transaction management. They serve five primary customer segments: real estate professionals, lending professionals, commercial professionals, builders, and home buyers/sellers. Their digital platforms include LT.digital, ComDocPro, and a secure customer portal for real-time transaction access. They also offer 1031 exchange services and educational classes for professionals.

Land Title distinguishes itself through its emphasis on accuracy, on-time processing, and meticulous record searches. As a Colorado-native company, they maintain strong community involvement—in 2025, they supported Junior Achievement-Rocky Mountain through their annual charitable campaign. They position themselves as a "big company with small feel," emphasizing employee satisfaction alongside customer service. Their Premier Lender Services (PLS) caters specifically to mortgage professionals with dedicated support.

While Land Title is clearly a leader in Colorado title services, the company's primary function is title insurance and closing facilitation rather than mortgage lending. They do not originate loans or offer mortgage products—they provide essential transaction support services for mortgage lenders and real estate transactions. Consumers should view this as a closing/title partner within the mortgage process, not as a primary mortgage lender.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 60+ year established history as Colorado's leader in title services since 1967
Extensive statewide presence with 45+ offices and 600+ employees
Secure digital portal with real-time transaction access and document management
Specialized Premier Lender Services (PLS) dedicated to mortgage lender support
Family-owned structure with emphasis on personalized customer service
Comprehensive service offerings including construction loans, 1031 exchanges, and educational resources
Active community involvement with annual charitable campaigns
cons: Colorado-focused operations—limited to statewide service only, not national coverage
Not a mortgage lender; cannot originate loans or offer financing products
Website lacks transparent pricing information for title insurance and closing services
Recently paused FinCEN AML data collection (as of March 23, 2026), which may impact certain commercial clients
As a B2B-focused company, limited direct consumer-facing loan or credit products
best_for: Colorado real estate professionals seeking title insurance and closing services
Mortgage lenders and loan officers needing dedicated transaction support
Home buyers and sellers completing transactions in Colorado
Commercial real estate investors and builders requiring title and escrow services
diagnosis: Land Title Guarantee Company is best for Colorado real estate professionals, mortgage lenders, and property buyers/sellers who need reliable title insurance, closing services, and transaction management. The main caveat is that this is a closing services and title company, not a mortgage lender—they facilitate the transaction process but do not originate loans or offer credit products.
services: Premier Lender Services (PLS) for mortgage professionals
Educational classes for real estate professionals
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
